parents.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_inactive into OBDF_INACTIVE

commit.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_no_ir into OBDF_NO_IR
commit.message:
LU-18231 obd: change obd_no_ir into OBDF_NO_IR

Change the use of the odb_no_ir bitfield into a bit in
the ofd_flags bitmap and use atomic bit set/clear/test
operations on it.
No logical changes to the code and no changes to locking.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Build-Parameters: distro=el9.3 arch=x86_64
Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I823eadce6bc87df51ce4b591622bd93bd64f96d4
